lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਭਏ ਗਤੁ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh rog bhe gat tan te man niramal har har gun gaae |
lines.english: Pain and disease have left my body, and my mind has become pure; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਅਨੰਦ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਅਬ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਕਤ ਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhe anand mil saadhoo sang ab meraa man kat hee na jaae |1|
lines.english: I am in bliss, meeting with the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and now, my mind does not go wandering. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਇਓ ਤਾਪ ਸਭ ਸਹਸਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: binas geo taap sabh sahasaa gur seetal milio sehaj subhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The fever of doubt has been totally eliminated; meeting the Guru, I am cooled and soothed, with intuitive ease. ||1||Pause||
My burning desires are quenched, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, O mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਾਵਤ ਰਹੇ ਏਕੁ ਇਕੁ ਬੂਝਿਆ ਆਇ ਬਸੇ ਅਬ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhaavat rahe ek ik boojhiaa aae base ab nihachal thaae |
lines.english: My wandering has ended, since I have realized the One and Only Lord; now, I have come to dwell in the eternal place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਤੁ ਉਧਾਰਨ ਸੰਤ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪੇਖਤ ਰਹੇ ਅਘਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jagat udhaaran sant tumaare darasan pekhat rahe aghaae |2|
lines.english: Your Saints are the Saving Grace of the world; beholding the Blessed Vision of their Darshan, I remain satisfied. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਦੋਖ ਪਰੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਾਛੈ ਅਬ ਪਕਰੇ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam dokh pare mere paachhai ab pakare nihachal saadhoo paae |
lines.english: I have left behind the sins of countless incarnations, now that I have grasped the feet of the eternal Holy Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਗਾਵੈ ਮੰਗਲ ਮਨੂਆ ਅਬ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਫੁਨਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sehaj dhun gaavai mangal manooaa ab taa kau fun kaal na khaae |3|
lines.english: My mind sings the celestial melody of bliss, and death shall no longer consume it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਾਰਨ ਸਮਰਥ ਹਮਾਰੇ ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath hamaare sukhadaaee mere har har raae |
lines.english: My Lord, the Cause of all causes, is All-powerful, the Giver of peace; He is my Lord, my Lord King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਇ ॥੪॥੯॥
lines.translit: naam teraa jap jeevai naanak ot pot merai sang sahaae |4|9|
lines.english: Nanak lives by chanting Your Name, O Lord; You are my helper, with me, through and through. ||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਬਿਸਰਿਆ ਅਪਣਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਪਾਵੈ ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesar bisariaa apanaa keetaa paavai nindak |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has forgotten the Supreme Lord, the Transcendent Lord; the slanderer reaps the rewards of his own actions. ||1||Pause||
The slanderer cries out and bewails.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋਈ ਉਸ ਕਾ ਸੰਗੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਲੇ ਲਏ ਸਿਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: je koee us kaa sangee hovai naale le sidhaavai |
lines.english: If someone is his companion, then he shall be taken along with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਣਹੋਦਾ ਅਜਗਰੁ ਭਾਰੁ ਉਠਾਏ ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ਅਗਨੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਜਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anahodaa ajagar bhaar utthaae nindak aganee maeh jalaavai |1|
lines.english: Like the dragon, the slanderer carries his huge, useless loads, and burns in his own fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਕੈ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਜਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਤੀਤੈ ਸੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: paramesar kai duaarai ji hoe biteetai su naanak aakh sunaavai |
lines.english: Nanak proclaims and announces what happens at the Door of the Transcendent Lord.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਇ ਬਿਗਸਾਵੈ ॥੨॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: bhagat janaa kau sadaa anand hai har keeratan gaae bigasaavai |2|10|
lines.english: The humble devotees of the Lord are forever in bliss; singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, they blossom forth. ||2||10||
I applied various scented oils to my body,
Even though I totally decorated myself,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਭੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਪਤੀਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tau bhee meraa man na pateeaaraa |
lines.english: still, my mind was not satisfied.
Within my mind, I hold such a desire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu sukh til samaan nahee paavau |
lines.english: and yet, I did not obtain even a tiny bit of pleasure from this.
that I may live only to behold my Beloved, O my mother. ||1||
Garments, ornaments, and such exquisite pleasures
It is bewitched by the tender love of my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਕਹਾ ਕਰਉ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਧੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaee kahaa krau ihu man na dheerai |
lines.english: O mother, what should I do? This mind cannot rest.
obedience by the whole world,
Likewise, honor, fame, dignity and greatness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਭੀ ਜਾਨਉ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਲੇਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: oe bhee jaanau kitai na lekhai |
lines.english: I look upon these as of no account.
and such abundant pleasures and entertainments,
With foods and delicacies of so many different kinds,
and a household as beautiful as a jewel.
If I am pleasing to God's Will, then I shall be blessed, and forever in bliss. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਨ ਜਾਇਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: man nahee dhraapai trisanaa na jaaeis |
lines.english: with these, the mind is not satisfied, and its thirst is not quenched.
power and property and absolute command

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਤਾ ਸਭ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: milai prabhoo taa sabh sukh paavai |3|
lines.english: Meeting God, I find peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਮਿਲਬੇ ਇਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਨ ਬਿਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: bin milabe ihu din na bihaavai |
lines.english: Without meeting Him, this day does not pass.
By searching and seeking, I have heard this news,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis masatak bhaag tin satigur paaeaa |
lines.english: One who has this good destiny written upon his forehead, finds the True Guru.
that without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, no one swims across.
His hopes are fulfilled, and his mind is satisfied.
When one meets God, then his thirst is quenched.
Nanak has found the Lord, within his mind and body. ||4||11||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Panch-Padhay:
